basic_details.job_title: IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur (IIT Jodhpur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree with a minimum of 55% marks in Psychology, Educational Psychology, Education, Cognitive Science, Human Development, Educational Technology, Social Sciences, or any allied discipline. UGC-NET/JRF or M.Phil. or Ph.D. in a relevant discipline preferred.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate degree with a minimum of 55% marks in Psychology, Educational Psychology, Education, Cognitive Science, Human Development, Educational Technology, Social Sciences, or any allied discipline. UGC-NET/JRF or possess an M.Phil. or Ph.D. in a relevant discipline. Strong understanding of quantitative and qualitative research methods, survey design, and mixed-methods research. Working knowledge of statistical and data analysis software such as SPSS, R, JAMOVI, STATA, NVivo, or ATLAS.ti. Prior experience in educational research, programme evaluation, school-based studies, or educational technology (EdTech) projects. Experience in conducting field surveys, classroom observations, interviews, focus group discussions, and stakeholder consultations. Familiarity with educational psychology constructs such as digital literacy, learning motivation, self-efficacy, self-regulated learning, student engagement, and cognitive load. Experience in data management, report writing, policy briefs, and academic publications. Knowledge of digital education initiatives and policies.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jodhpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Postgraduate degree with a minimum of 55% marks in Psychology, Educational Psychology, Education, Cognitive Science, Human Development, Educational Technology, Social Sciences, or any allied discipline. UGC-NET/JRF or possess an M.Phil. or Ph.D. in a relevant discipline. Strong understanding of quantitative and qualitative research methods, survey design, and mixed-methods research. Working knowledge of statistical and data analysis software such as SPSS, R, JAMOVI, STATA, NVivo, or ATLAS.ti. Prior experience in educational research, programme evaluation, school-based studies, or educational technology (EdTech) projects. Experience in conducting field surveys, classroom observations, interviews, focus group discussions, and stakeholder consultations. Familiarity with educational psychology constructs such as digital literacy, learning motivation, self-efficacy, self-regulated learning, student engagement, and cognitive load. Experience in data management, report writing, policy briefs, and academic publications. Knowledge of digital education initiatives and policies.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jodhpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Assistant position at IIT Jodhpur is 25th July 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: A Postgraduate degree with a minimum of 55% marks in Psychology, Educational Psychology, Education, Cognitive Science, Human Development, Educational Technology, Social Sciences, or any allied discipline is required. UGC-NET/JRF or M.Phil./Ph.D. is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The consolidated compensation for the Research Assistant position is up to Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant position at IIT Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Jodhpur Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Research Assistant position is temporary, for ongoing Sponsored Research and Development Projects.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITJ/RD/R/SRP/S/ICSSR/SDK/20250275/2026/144.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Jodhpur offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What are the key skills required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Key skills include strong understanding of research methods, statistical software proficiency, experience in educational research, data management, and report writing.
